content.problemStatement:
NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã are placed in a circle in such a way that for each valid iii, AiA_iAi‚Äã and Ai+1A_{i+1}Ai+1‚Äã are adjacent, and A1A_1A1‚Äã and ANA_NAN‚Äã are also adjacent.

We want to repeat the following operation exactly N‚àí1N-1N‚àí1 times (until only one number remains):


Select two adjacent numbers. Let's denote them by aaa and bbb.
Score a+ba+ba+b penalty points.
Erase both aaa and bbb from the circle and insert a+ba+ba+b in the space between them.
What is the minimum number of penalty points we can score?
constraints: a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aNa_1, a_2, \ldots, a_Na1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äã are distinct powers of 222 (including 111)
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aNa_1, a_2, \ldots, a_Na1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî the minimum number of penalty points.
